title: SCBS 0.5 service target
rationale: SCBS is already operational at the engine level. The next highest-value work is not more planner depth but service ownership: operator/admin HTTP APIs for diagnostics and queue control, persistent background worker execution with retry semantics, and a service-grade standalone operations baseline. Those three pieces are the shortest path from usable engine to dependable standalone service for swarm use.

name: scbs-0-6-admin-worker-surface
description: SCBS 0.6 service ownership should share one durable job model across CLI, HTTP admin APIs, SDK, and PostgreSQL state: expose doctor/job inspection over /api/v1/admin, make repo scan and receipt validation queueable, add retry-aware job fields (attempts, maxAttempts, availableAt, lastError, started/completed timestamps), and run persistent worker loops over the same drain primitive rather than inventing a separate execution path.
